content.text: Now let me check the current state of the implementation to make accurate predictions.

The CLI's `validateDamages` only checks that the damaged item type is in the policy items - it does NOT check that the count of damages of a given type doesn't exceed what's insured. So with two sword damages and one sword in the policy, validation will pass and the claim will proceed.
